name: TouchRipple

records.name: RippleEntry
records.signature: RippleEntry(Guid Id, double X, double Y)

examples.title: Custom Color
examples.code:
<TouchRipple Color="#3b82f6" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Secondary">Blue ripple</Button>
</TouchRipple>

<TouchRipple Color="#ef4444" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Secondary">Red ripple</Button>
</TouchRipple>

examples.title: Custom Opacity and Duration
examples.code:
<!-- High opacity, fast -->
<TouchRipple Opacity="0.5" DurationMs="300" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Outline">Fast (300 ms)</Button>
</TouchRipple>

<!-- Low opacity, slow -->
<TouchRipple Opacity="0.1" DurationMs="900" Class="inline-block rounded-md">
    <Button Variant="ButtonVariant.Outline">Slow (900 ms)</Button>
</TouchRipple>

examples.title: Ripple on a Card
examples.code:
<TouchRipple Class="block rounded-xl w-full max-w-sm cursor-pointer">
    <Card Class="p-5">
        <Text Class="font-medium">Interactive card</Text>
        <Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Tap anywhere to see the ripple.</Text>
    </Card>
</TouchRipple>

mdSummary:
# TouchRipple

Touch Ripple component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/touch-ripple

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| TouchRipple | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TouchRipple | Color | `string` | `"currentColor"` |  |
| TouchRipple | Opacity | `double` | `0.25` |  |
| TouchRipple | DurationMs | `int` | `500` |  |
| TouchRipple | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TouchRipple | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (TouchRipple) — RenderFragment slot

- (none)

